resultList.dtldesc: Discover modern, upscale living in the prestigious TARC Tripundra project by TARC Limited, nestled in the rapidly developing and wellconnected neighbourhood of Bijwasan, New Delhi. This furnished 3 BHK apartment offers a blend of contemporary design, spacious interiors and readytomove comfort, making it an ideal home for discerning families and professionals seeking quality living in one of the capitals most soughtafter localities.Property SpecificationsThis eastfacing apartment occupies the seventh floor of a tenstorey residential tower and spans a generous super builtup area of 2,198 sq. ft. The wellplanned layout features three comfortable bedrooms and three bathrooms, providing ample space for family living and privacy. The interiors come fully furnished with thoughtful fittings that enhance comfort and convenience from day one. The layout accommodates a wellsized living and dining area designed to facilitate relaxed family time and social gatherings, while the bedrooms are positioned to maximise natural light and ventilation. Being part of a new construction, the apartment reflects contemporary architectural standards, quality finishes and an overall sense of modernity and finesse.FacilitiesResidents benefit from a professionally developed residence that supports an enhanced lifestyle. The furnished condition of the apartment allows immediate relocation without the need for additional investment in interiors, offering ease and practicality for buyers. The building is designed with quality infrastructure and integrates services that contribute to seamless everyday living. Thoughtfully designed common areas, lifts, contemporary finishes and wellmaintained spaces underpin the overall appeal of this home. Beyond the interior comforts, the projects professional development ensures ongoing maintenance standards that support both aesthetics and functional utilities.LocalityBijwasan is a strategically located neighbourhood in southwest New Delhi, known for its robust connectivity and expanding urban amenities. The locality benefits from proximity to major transport corridors, including metro links and arterial roads that connect seamlessly to central parts of Delhi and the wider National Capital Region. It also offers access to reputed educational institutions, healthcare facilities, retail destinations, dining options and recreational spaces, making daily life both convenient and fulfilling. With ongoing infrastructure development and rising residential demand, Bijwasan continues to evolve as a residential hub that blends contemporary comfort with city connectivity.
